name: Arrays
description: Master linear array structures, sub-segments checks, prefix sums, and element caching.
learning_objectives: Understand linear memory indexing and contiguous allocation layouts
Evaluate range sum updates using Prefix Sum arrays in O(1) time
Learn boundary shifts and window index tracking under search constraints

patterns.name: Prefix Sum
patterns.description: Precompute cumulative sums to compute dynamic range sums in O(1) time.

concepts.name: 1D Prefix Sum Basics
concepts.theory_markdown:
# 1D Prefix Sum Basics

The prefix sum pattern is a powerful optimization technique designed to compute cumulative indicators across sub-intervals of an array in constant time `O(1)`.

### The Core Idea

For a given array `nums` of size `N`, we construct an auxiliary array `prefix` where each element at index `i` stores the sum of all elements up to index `i`.

```text
prefix[i] = nums[0] + nums[1] + ... + nums[i]
```

Once computed, range sum `sum(L, R)` is:
`prefix[R] - prefix[L-1]` (if L > 0).
learning_objectives: Construct prefix sum arrays in O(N) time complexity
Understand boundary checks for range index queries
